title: BDRY - January 3, 2023
summary: Quiet holiday break drives spot Capesize rates lower - As the Christmas holiday break comes to an end and traders China's unwinding of strict virus controls leads to a surge in cases, but the process of reopening is underway - As Dry bulk focus shifts back to fundamentals - Following a period of high uncertainty and significant disruptions
